title: Sprint 54 Wave B: Auto-skip blocks after N consecutive place timeouts
description:
Evidence: blocks 1, 7, 8, 11, 23 keep timing out cycle after cycle. The planner retries them forever until the governor stalls. The LLM (once forceEvaluate is working) can suggest skipping them, but we should also have a deterministic auto-skip for blocks that time out N times consecutively.

Fix: in SweepTimedOutActions or DispatchActionsAsync, track per-block consecutive timeout counts. After a threshold (e.g., 3 consecutive timeouts for the same block index), automatically mark the block as "skipped" in world facts so the planner stops dispatching PlaceBlock for it.
